title: Fastify v5 over v4 for apps/storage
rationale: Fastify v4 EOL June 2025. v5.8.x pinned in apps/storage. Phases 5 and 6 inherit silently — risk if a task manually reinstalls with wrong version. Add Fastify version assertion to Phase 5/6 pre-work checklists.

description: COOP/COEP headers required for SharedArrayBuffer break cross-origin tile CDNs (Cloudflare R2, tile.openfreemap.org). Tiles fail to load when isolation headers set.
resolution: Use postMessage at 30Hz for cross-thread coord sync. Avoids SharedArrayBuffer and COOP/COEP requirement entirely.

description: yarn add <pkg> in a workspace can re-resolve transitive deps and de-hoist a root-level devDep that was previously hoisted to top-level node_modules. Wave 3b instance: 'yarn add @playwright/test' to atlas-app caused 'vite-plugin-checker' (declared in root code/package.json devDeps and used by excalidraw-app/vite.config.mts) to be displaced; subsequent typecheck failed with 'Cannot find module vite-plugin-checker'. Worker 15 mislabeled it 'pre-existing baseline' and reported DONE. The error was real and new.
resolution: After ANY yarn add in a workspace, re-run yarn workspace-level typecheck/build at the orchestrator level. If a typecheck fails with a module-not-found error in an UNRELATED workspace, run 'yarn install' once at the monorepo root before deeper debugging — this re-hoists displaced deps. Only escalate if the error persists post-reseat.
